scenario: Nimbus Retailer streams 20000 messages per minute from an order capture service into a Camunda 8.8 Spring Boot worker fleet. The configuration still uses the legacy zeebe.client.message prefix to cap the maximum message size and the platform team must adopt the documented replacement key in the 8.8 properties reference before scaling the channel further.
question: Which property listed in the Camunda 8.8 Spring Boot starter reference replaces the legacy zeebe.client.message.max-message-size key?

options.text: The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.message.max-message-size key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.message.max-size under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.message.max-message-size key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.message-size-limit under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.

The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.message.max-message-size key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.zeebe.max-message-size under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.
The documented replacement property for the legacy zeebe.client.message.max-message-size key in Camunda 8.8 is camunda.client.max-message-size under the Spring Boot starter properties reference.

a.text: Incorrect. The 8.8 reference flattens the key under camunda.client and keeps the max-message-size name; camunda.client.message.max-size is not listed in the properties table.

b.text: Incorrect. The replacement keeps the original max-message-size token; there is no camunda.client.message-size-limit entry in the 8.8 properties reference.

c.text: Incorrect. The replacement drops the zeebe segment; the 8.8 reference does not include a camunda.client.zeebe.max-message-size property.

d.text: Correct. The properties reference maps zeebe.client.message.max-message-size to camunda.client.max-message-size at the top level of the camunda.client namespace in 8.8.

explanation: Client-wide channel limits sit directly under camunda.client.* in the 8.8 Spring Boot starter; the documented replacement for zeebe.client.message.max-message-size is camunda.client.max-message-size.
